description_long: This is a heavyset adult human figure with a bald head and an expressive, open-mouthed facial expression. The individual is wearing a sleeveless, long, textured garment that extends to the ankles, fitting closely to the body. The arms are extended horizontally to the sides, and the hands are relaxed. The feet are bare and visible beneath the hem of the garment. The skin appears smooth and pale, contrasting with the garment's rougher texture. The overall appearance suggests a robust build and a somewhat stern or intense demeanor.
description: A bald, heavyset adult wearing a sleeveless, long textured garment with arms outstretched and bare feet visible. The figure has a pronounced facial expression and a robust build.
description_view_0: Front view showing the expressive face, outstretched arms, and the full length of the sleeveless garment.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the head, the arm's extension, and the garment's fit along the body.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, the broad shoulders, and the garment's full coverage down to the ankles.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side profile, arm extension, and the garment's contour along the body.
attribute_clothing_type: sleeveless long dress or robe with a textured surface
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
